contribution_description: [CONTRIBUTION EVENT] - Type: Time (Minutes) - Amount: 30 - Description: capoeira: Tribo Bahia logo across all pages + fix library.html empty bug Pull requests (GitHub evidence): - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/capoeira/pull/8 - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/capoeira/pull/9 Details: Two capoeira.agroverse.shop fixes after Gary spotted issues: 1. TrueSightDAO/capoeira#8 — replace Agroverse logo with the canonical Tribo Bahia Capoeira logo (circular Brazil-colors design, Mestre Bico Duro silhouette playing berimbau, "TRIBO BAHIA" outer, "capoeira" below, "Itacaré, Brasil" curved right) supplied as ~/Downloads/tribo_bahia.png. Installed at assets/images/logo/tribobahia-logo.png + sips-downscaled favicon-192 / favicon-32 variants. Updated all 4 HTML pages (index/library/practice/transparency) — nav + . Zero agroverse-logo refs remain. 2. TrueSightDAO/capoeira#9 — fix library.html rendering empty on the live site. The move table had `style="display:none"` inline; the JS in move-library.js only removes the `.hidden` class, so the inline style won and the table stayed hidden forever despite data/moves.json loading all 39 moves successfully. Swap inline style for `class="hidden"` so the classList toggle in JS actually controls visibility. Live site redeploys via GitHub Pages ~1-2 min after merge. - Contributor(s): Gary Teh - TDG Issued: 50.00 - Attached Filename: N/A - Destination Contribution File Location: N/A -------- My Digital Signature:  Request Transaction ID:  This submission was generated using https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/blob/main/DAO_CLIENT_AI_AGENT_CONTRIBUTIONS.md Verify submission here: https://dapp.truesight.me/verify_request.html
